headline: Taiwan Stocks Slide 2% Amid China Tensions

article.title: Taiwan Vows Not to Be ‘Silenced’ After China Expels NYT Reporter
article.summary: Taiwan has condemned the expulsion of a New York Times journalist from China over an interview the US-based newspaper conducted with the self-ruled island’s leader, saying it is common for a president of a democratic country to explain its position.
